summary: Frontend-only testing of Play page refactoring: 7-tile category strip, Mira's Play Picks section, 6 dim cards (no Mira's Picks card), Mira's Picks modal from strip, Fitness strip/dim interactions, Book a Service tab with 4 service cards. 10/10 features verified as WORKING.

minor.issue: No AI-scored picks returned for Mojo - MiraPicksSection falls back to showing 'Mira Imagines' placeholder cards. This is expected fallback behavior, not a bug.

test_results.T2_play_page_loads: PASS - /play loads with Mojo's data (Play & Explore for Mojo hero)
test_results.T3_category_strip_7_tiles: PASS - All 7 rounded icon tiles present: Outings & Parks, Playdates, Dog Walking, Fitness, Swimming, Soul Play, Mira's Picks (pink/purple)
test_results.T4_mira_picks_section: PASS - 'Mira's Play Picks for Mojo' heading + 'AI Scored' badge visible above dim cards; shows 4 'Mira Imagines' fallback cards (no actual AI picks from backend yet)
test_results.T5_dim_cards_count_6: PASS - Exactly 6 dim cards (outings, playdates, walking, fitness, swimming, soul). No 'Mira's Picks' or 'mira' dim card present.
test_results.T6_miras_picks_modal: PASS - Clicking 'Mira's Picks' strip tile opens full-screen modal (confirmed: ✕ close button found and clicked successfully)
test_results.T7_close_miras_picks_modal: PASS - ✕ button found and clicked, modal closed
test_results.T8_fitness_strip_click: PASS - Clicking Fitness strip tile: (a) Play & Explore tab activated (border: 2.5px solid rgb(231,111,81)), (b) Fitness dim card highlighted (border: 2px solid rgb(231,111,81)), (c) inline panel expanded
test_results.T9_fitness_dim_click: PASS - Direct click on Fitness dim card toggles inline expansion
test_results.T10_book_service_tab: PASS - 4 service cards present: Dog Walking, Fitness & Training, Swimming & Hydro, Playdate Coordination. All 4 booking buttons found (play-service-book-0 through 3). Buttons labeled 'Book Mojo's [Service] →'
test_results.T11_service_book_toast: PASS - Clicking 'Book Mojo's Dog Walking' shows ConciergeToast: 'Sent to Concierge! Your concierge enquiry has been raised.'

critical_code_review_comments: PlaySoulPage.jsx is 1504 lines - could benefit from splitting into smaller components
The MiraPicksSection receives `pet` prop but no actual play picks are returned from backend for play pillar (only Mira Imagines fallback shown)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Play page refactoring complete and verified. Key features: 7-tile category strip (play-category-strip, tiles: play-strip-{outings|playdates|walking|fitness|swimming|soul|miras-picks}), 6 dim cards (play-dim-{outings|fitness|walking|swimming|playdates|soul}), MiraPicksSection above dims, Mira's Picks modal opens from strip, Book a Service tab has 4 cards (play-service-book-0 to 3). Login URL: /login (not /member-login).
visual_observations: Category strip tiles have rounded-square icon backgrounds (gradient-filled, 10px border-radius) matching Dine page style
Mira's Picks tile has pink gradient background (#FCE4EC → #FF6B9D) and purple text label - visually distinctive
Mira's Play Picks section shows 'Mira Imagines' placeholder cards (correct fallback when no actual AI picks available)
Service cards in Book a Service tab show personalized button labels: 'Book Mojo's Dog Walking →', etc.
ConciergeToast shows 'Sent to Concierge!' with green checkmark
